title: Brandads 11 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 high-end fashion campaign poster for Vellum Atelier, featuring architectural perfume bottle. Main title: THE NEW SIGNAL Subtitle: THE NEW SIGNAL Color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver Outfit: minimal high-fashion campaign mood Accessories / props: Vertical high-end fashion campaign poster direction Scene: pale seamless editorial studio Action: adjusting earrings while holding the perfume bottle near the collarbone Style: premium, elegant, retro-luxury, editorial, magazine-style, cinematic, soft-focus photography. Use a mirror-based composition: the model appears through a mirror reflection, with a blurred foreground, soft light leaks, warm retro tones, realistic fabric texture, subtle reflections, and a polished luxury campaign feel. The model should look like an adult woman with realistic skin texture, refined styling, and a natural elegant pose, such as adjusting earrings, touching a necklace, fixing hair, holding a perfume bottle, or looking into the mirror. Include clean magazine-style typography: small editorial text at the top, a large serif headline in the lower-middle area, and small CTA / season text at the bottom. Avoid cheap commercial styling, flat lighting, plastic skin, messy typography, distorted jewelry, awkward hands, and generic e-commerce poster layouts.
